daodejing.title: Boshu Laozi Reader
daodejing.welcomeSub: Choose from the sidebar, or tap below

tutorial.welcomeContent: Integrating the Dao De Jing's 'action through non-action', Buddhist 'unmoving direct mind', and the ψ=ψ(ψ) Theory of Everything's collapse cosmology. Daily check-ins cultivate awareness and transcend the cycle of reincarnation.
tutorial.realmsContent: 10 realms on the cultivation path: Mortal → Qi Refining → Foundation → Golden Core → Nascent Soul → Spirit Transformation → Integration → Mahayana → Tribulation → True Immortal. Each realm requires different Enlightenment Points.
tutorial.moodsContent:
Daily observe your mind state:
• Transparent: Mind like mirror, all is empty (+15)
• Tranquil: Still water, no attachments (+10)
• Ripple: Gentle waves, foundation stable (+5)
• Chaotic: Mind scattered, needs stillness (+3)

Honest reflection is practice.
tutorial.firstCheckInContent: Now, let's complete your first check-in together. Choose your mood, set Wu Wei score, sense the Dao field, and write your reflections. The Master will provide personalized guidance based on your practice.
tutorial.giftContent:
Congratulations on completing the tutorial!

50 Enlightenment Points gifted as a welcome gift. Remember:
• Daily check-ins increase streak bonuses
• Honest reflection matters more than high scores
• Follow the Dao naturally, let things be

May you find your true self on this cultivation path.
